title: Commission
description: A monetary or non-monetary reward earned by a promoter for a referral conversion.

id.description: Unique identifier for the commission record.

amount.description: Commission amount in the account's currency.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the commission amount.

promoter_id.description: ID of the promoter who earned this commission.

referral_id.description: ID of the referral that generated this commission.

sale_amount.description: The sale amount that triggered this commission.

is_self_referral.description: Whether this commission was generated from a self-referral.

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the commission event.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the commission was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the commission was last updated.
